blue.line1: From project ownership and project management to project engineering.
blue.line2: Imagine, Create, Realise the Future of Transport.
blue.paragraph: Trusted partner for the design, construction and operation of sustainable and innovative transport infrastructures in France and internationally. For over 35 years, CEEB has supported public and private project owners in transforming their territories. We combine technical expertise, innovation and commitment to sustainability to deliver world-class railway and airport projects.

slide1.title: Excellence in Railway Engineering
slide1.description: Sustainable solutions for RATP, SNCF and major urban transport networks.

about.title: Our Multidisciplinary Expertise
about.content1: CEEB: Sustainable Engineering at the Service of the World
about.content2: CEEB has established itself as a key player in sustainable engineering and infrastructure on an international scale. From railway and airport mobility to urban projects, we support our clients and partners at every stage of their projects, combining technical expertise and strategic vision.
about.content3: Tailored Solutions, from Audit to Operations
about.content4: Our multidisciplinary teams offer services ranging from audit and consulting to project management and operational support. Through a global approach, we provide reliable and innovative solutions, perfectly adapted to the specific challenges of each project.
about.content5: Innovation and Performance for Every Project
about.content6: From strategic design to commissioning, CEEB leverages its expertise in technical studies, BIM, telecommunications, consulting and audit. Every project is an opportunity to transform complex challenges into concrete and sustainable solutions.

hero.title: 35 Years of Engineering Excellence
hero.description: Founded in 1989, CEEB is a trusted partner in major French infrastructure projects.
hero.subtitle: Founded in 1989, CEEB is a trusted partner in major French and international infrastructure projects.
hero.subtitle2: From design to commissioning, we support every stage of your projects.
hero.subtitle3: Over 40 engineers and experts at the service of your infrastructure projects.

pageHeader.title: About CEEB
pageHeader.text: Since 1989, CEEB has supported transport projects with multidisciplinary engineering, consulting and project management services.

history.title: 35 Years of Expertise
history.paragraph1: Founded on 1 March 1989 by Gérard SEBAG, CEEB | European Concept Equipment Building was born as a specialised engineering consultancy. From the outset, the company focused on high-quality technical studies and practical solutions for infrastructure and transport.
history.paragraph2: Over more than 35 years, CEEB has grown into a multidisciplinary company with proven expertise in mobility, urban planning, systems engineering and major public works. Our history is marked by commitment to our clients and projects that strengthen territories and improve daily life.

event1.title: CEEB Founded
event1.desc: Gérard SEBAG founds CEEB in Fontenay-sous-Bois. First railway engineering projects for RATP.

event2.title: Airport Expansion
event2.desc: CEEB develops its airport expertise with the first contracts for Aéroports de Paris (ADP).

event3.title: ISO Certification
event3.desc: ISO 9001 certification obtained. Strengthening of quality processes and working methods.

event4.title: International Development
event4.desc: First international projects in Africa and the Middle East. Opening up to new markets.

event5.title: BIM Transition
event5.desc: Full adoption of BIM tools and 3D modelling. CEEB becomes a reference player in digital engineering.

event6.title: Grand Paris Express
event6.desc: Major contribution to Grand Paris Express projects. 35 years of expertise serving tomorrow's infrastructure.

mission.title: Supporting Every Project
mission.paragraph1: Our mission is to support our clients from concept to commissioning, ensuring that every project benefits from rigorous engineering, operational know-how and a strong service culture.
mission.paragraph2: From the first hand-drawn projects with Rotring pens to modern digital tools and AI, we continue to evolve while maintaining a deep technical culture based on precision and reliability.
mission.text1: Our mission is to support our clients from concept to commissioning, ensuring that every project benefits from rigorous engineering, operational expertise and a strong service culture.
mission.text2: From early projects drawn by hand with Rotring pens to modern digital tools and AI, we continue to evolve while maintaining a deep technical culture based on precision and reliability.

values.title: What Guides Us
values.subtitle: Our values guide every step of our work.

card1.title: Excellence
card1.desc: We maintain high technical standards in every study, project and construction phase.

card2.title: Innovation
card2.desc: We continually explore new methods and technologies to deliver smarter infrastructure.

card3.title: Sustainability
card3.desc: We take a responsible approach focused on sustainability, environmental performance and social impact.

card4.title: Collaboration
card4.desc: Our work is a human adventure built on integrity, transparency and close collaboration with clients.

card5.title: Responsibility
card5.desc: We take into account the social and environmental dimensions of infrastructure.

card6.title: Our Team
card6.desc: Our multidisciplinary experts combine engineering, project management and operational know-how.

cta.title: Want to work with us?
cta.text: Contact us to discuss your projects and how CEEB can support your next infrastructure project.

who.title: CEEB: Engineering at the Service of Infrastructure
who.text1: Founded on 1 March 1989 by Gérard SEBAG, CEEB — European Concept Building Equipment is an engineering consultancy specialising in railway and airport secondary works.
who.text2: Over more than 35 years, CEEB has become a multidisciplinary company with proven expertise in mobility, urban planning, systems engineering and major public works.
who.text3: Our history is marked by commitment to our clients and projects that strengthen territories and improve daily life.

hero.title: 35 Years of Technical Expertise
hero.description: Over 35 years of expertise in railway, airport and infrastructure engineering.
hero.subtitle: Complete engineering solutions for railway and airport infrastructure.
hero.subtitle2: RATP, SNCF, Grand Paris Express — design and project management.
hero.subtitle3: ADP, regional airports — electrical systems and telecommunications.

pageHeader.title: Our Technical Expertise
pageHeader.text: Complete engineering solutions for railway and airport infrastructure, from design to commissioning.

domains.title: Areas of expertise

moa.title: Project Ownership (MOA)
moa.desc: Project owner assistance, management of complex projects, stakeholder coordination.

moe.title: Project Management (MOE)
moe.desc: Works execution management, technical supervision, quality control and project handover.

elec.title: Electrical Engineering
elec.desc: HV/LV/ICT studies, power supply for railway and airport infrastructures.

telecom.title: Telecommunications
telecom.desc: Engineering of communication systems for transport networks: radio, fibre optic, IP networks and passenger information systems.

bim.title: BIM & Digital
bim.desc: BIM modelling of electrical and telecom installations, digital coordination and model management for better collaboration.

audit.title: Audit & Consulting
audit.desc: Technical audits, infrastructure diagnostics, feasibility studies and strategic consulting.

domains.subtitle: CEEB is involved throughout the entire lifecycle of transport infrastructure projects.

railway.title: Railway Engineering
railway.desc: Design studies, project management and owner's representative services for metro, tram, RER and high-speed rail projects.

airport.title: Airport Engineering
airport.desc: Complete expertise for airports and aeronautical platforms: terminals, runways, navigation systems and technical infrastructure.

electric.title: High Voltage Electricity
electric.desc: Studies and project management of high and low voltage electrical installations for all types of transport structures.

lowvoltage.title: Low Voltage & Security
lowvoltage.desc: Design and monitoring of fire safety systems, access control, video surveillance and intrusion detection.

railway.title: Railway
railway.desc: SNCF, RATP, Grand Paris Express — design, renovation and commissioning of railway infrastructures.

airport.title: Airport
airport.desc: ADP, regional airports — electrical systems, telecommunications and airport security.

urban.title: Urban & Building
urban.desc: Local authorities, developers — technical building engineering, smart building and sustainable development.

international.title: International
international.desc: Projects in Africa, Middle East, Europe — skills transfer and local engineering.

cta.title: An engineering project?
cta.text: Our team is available to study your needs and propose a tailored solution.

approach.title: Our MOA / MOE approach
approach.paragraph1: CEEB acts both as delegated project owner (MOA) and as project manager (MOE), offering a global and integrated vision of infrastructure projects.
approach.paragraph2: Our multidisciplinary team brings together engineers specialised in electrical engineering, telecommunications, civil engineering and project management.

references.title: Project references
references.subtitle: Some flagship projects carried out by CEEB in France and internationally.

card1.title: Railway Engineering
card1.desc: Design studies, project management and owner's representative services for metro, tram, RER and high-speed rail projects. Signalling systems, traction power supply and railway telecommunications.

card2.title: Airport Engineering
card2.desc: Complete expertise for airports and aeronautical platforms: terminals, runways, navigation systems and technical infrastructure. Airfield lighting, baggage systems and fire safety.

card3.title: High Voltage Electrical
card3.desc: Studies and project management for high and low voltage electrical installations. HV/LV transformation substations, main LV switchboards, lighting and generators.

card4.title: Low Voltage & Security
card4.desc: Design and monitoring of fire safety systems, access control, CCTV and intrusion detection. SSI/SSA, CCTV, intercom and perimeter systems.

card5.title: BIM & Digital Modelling
card5.desc: BIM modelling of electrical and telecom installations, digital coordination and model management. Revit MEP, AutoCAD, 3D coordination and clash detection.

card6.title: Audit & Advisory
card6.desc: Technical audits, infrastructure diagnostics, feasibility studies and strategic advisory. Support from the upstream phase through to project handover.

projects.title: Reference Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of CEEB's landmark projects in France and internationally.

project1.title: Grand Paris Express — Line 15
project1.desc: Electrical and telecommunications studies for the new Grand Paris Express stations. BIM coordination and project management.

project2.title: Charles de Gaulle Airport — Terminal 2
project2.desc: Renovation of electrical systems and fire safety in Terminal 2. Airfield lighting and baggage systems.

project3.title: RATP — Line 13 Renovation
project3.desc: Modernisation of signalling and telecommunications systems on Paris Metro Line 13.

project4.title: SNCF — South-East HSL
project4.desc: Electrical and telecommunications engineering studies for maintenance and modernisation of the HSL.

project5.title: Algiers Airport — Houari Boumediene
project5.desc: Project management for the modernisation of electrical and security systems at the international airport.

adp.subtitle: Strategic Partnership & Innovation
adp.title: Multi-Technical Synergies & ADP Projects
adp.desc: In close partnership with SOFRE-IN and Crites, C.E.E.B. provides a comprehensive, integrated, and highly qualified response to the major infrastructure challenges of the ADP Group (Roissy CDG & Paris-Orly) for today and tomorrow.

ceeb.title: Civil Engineering & Utilities
ceeb.desc: Engineering consultancy specialising in civil engineering, structures, utility networks, roadworks, technical diagnostics, and geotechnical modelling.

sofre.title: Electrical Engineering & Energy
sofre.desc: State-of-the-art expertise in High Voltage (CFO) / Low Voltage (CFA), telecommunications networks, airport security, and smart energy grid management.

crites.title: BIM Synthesis & CAD/BIM Support
crites.desc: Complex project management, CAD/BIM support (AutoCAD/Revit), technical coordination, 3D/4D network synthesis, and global BIM infrastructure management.

projects.title: Our Fields of Intervention & Ecological Transition
projects.desc: As a trusted consortium, we are ideally positioned to intervene in the major reorganization and modernization markets of ADP:

lot1.title: ⚡ Ecological Transition & Electrification
lot1.desc: Electrical engineering studies for the electrification of aircraft stands at contact in order to eliminate the use of polluting APUs and integrate future electric GPUs.

lot2.title: ✈️ Terminal Reorganization 2027
lot2.desc: Supporting ADP in its major restructuring of Roissy CDG terminals (renaming and reconfiguring Terminals 1 to 7, access, parking, passenger flows).

lot3.title: 🛠️ Runway Rehabilitation & Lighting
lot3.desc: Project management and technical assistance for complete runway renovation (e.g. Orly Runway 4), airfield lighting loops, cabling, and secure power supply.
